data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that the system notifies active climbers to re-sign after a waiver update, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the necessary functionality is not demonstrated or validated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of re-sign requirement when terms update.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-sign notification process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system notifies active climbers to re-sign when waiver terms are updated.
